Document:
# COFFEEHOUSE-CLASS RESTAURANT SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-2
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Plasma
# Shuttle Brief
"A small-sized café ship equipped with a small kitchen and botany, ready to brew the best coffee in the galaxy."
[italic]Brought to you by Settler's Spacecraft Firm.[/italic]
# Ship Functions
# Entertainment
[bold][color=#a4885c]________________________________________________________________________[/color]
## Brewing Coffee
No.
Icon
Step
1
Plant coffee seeds and harvest some coffee beans.
2
Take the coffee beans and bake it for 5 seconds in an oven.
3
Put it inside a grinder and grind it into a fine powder.
4
Mix it with water, 3:1 ratio of water to coffee grounds for maximum coffee extraction without diluting it.
5
Take your coffee ground mixed with water and bake it in the oven till it brews, the more coffee you bake at once, the longer it takes.
6
Pour the hot coffee inside a mug or a cup and enjoy!
[bold][color=#a4885c]________________________________________________________________________[/color]

# PREFLIGHT CHECKLIST
- Optimal [bold]Target Power[/bold] (kW) for the Coffeehouse is [color=#a4885c]17 [bold]kW[/bold][/color].
